pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-A-004 (Technology Fundamentals/Ability) scores 0.441 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.441). Scope is in_scope for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technology Fundamentals appears in approximately 65% of Clinical AI Specialist job postings. Technical system fundamentals expected for senior clinical AI implementation roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Technology Fundamentals is market-validated for Clinical AI Specialist. Final decision: include.
